meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Accelerate Development: Mastering User Onboarding for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop wasting time on repetitive onboarding. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-converting, automated user flows in minutes.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from manual, repetitive onboarding logic. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can automate user journeys. This approach shifts your focus from boilerplate code to high-value product features, slashing development time by 60% while delivering enterprise-grade user experiences for clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint. You’re staring at yet another login flow, repetitive state management, and the soul-crushing realization that you’re building the same onboarding infrastructure for the tenth time this year. Your client wants a premium experience yesterday, but your velocity is trapped in a bottleneck of manual configuration.

It’s time to break the cycle. By treating onboarding as a modular, AI-orchestrated asset rather than a custom build, you regain your competitive edge. In this case study, we’ll dismantle slow development patterns and replace them with a high-velocity stack using Antigravity and Claude Code—turning weeks of friction into hours of execution.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, map out your onboarding steps using a structured JSON schema. This ensures your AI tools understand the state requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular React onboarding schema that defines 4 distinct steps: welcome, profile setup, preferences, and dashboard initialization. Include validation logic for each step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a TypeScript interface for the onboarding schema defined by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Component
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate UI, ensuring it adheres to accessibility standards and your chosen design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-conversion onboarding component library using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion for step transitions. Ensure it is fully responsive.

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Centralize onboarding state to prevent data loss during browser refreshes, using a lightweight local storage sync.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom React hook 'useOnboarding' that persists user progress to local storage and handles navigation between steps.

steps.title: Integrate API Validation
steps.description: Connect your onboarding form to your backend, ensuring data integrity before finalizing the user account.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an API utility layer that validates user profile data against a Zod schema before sending it to the backend endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --run 'npm install zod && npx ts-node validate-schema.ts'

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing
steps.description: Ensure your onboarding flow remains bug-free by generating automated test suites for every logical branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vitest suite for the onboarding component that covers edge cases like skipped steps and network failure during submission.

pro_tips: Always use Zod for runtime schema validation on the client-side; it prevents 90% of integration bugs before they hit the server.
Implement 'optimistic UI' updates in your onboarding flow to make the experience feel instantaneous to the end user.
Store onboarding progress in a cookie or IndexedDB if you need to support cross-device session recovery.
Use Claude Code to periodically audit your codebase for 'unused imports' and 'dead logic' to keep the onboarding bundle size under 50kb.
Always add a 'Skip' button for power users, but track their exit point to identify friction in your flow.
content.next_steps: Deploy your new onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a lighthouse audit, and gather feedback from at least three beta users before the final client handover.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start orchestrating your success. Our community of elite developers is shipping faster than ever using these exact AI-driven workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
